reasoning: The freeze value of this market is 0.05 (5%), which reflects a strong community consensus that it is highly unlikely Elon Musk will officially establish a new political party in 2025. Currently, Musk exerts substantial political influence through the America PAC and alignment with the Republican Party, rather than through creating a completely new third party, which faces immense structural barriers in the US political system. Given the lack of incentives to dilute his influence into a third party, and adopting the wisdom of the crowds as represented by the freeze value, ~5% is the most mathematically sound estimate.
